creator: daveh@ci.com.au
text:
It is accepted amongst the OpenLDAP community that OpenLDAP should not use BDB 4.3, as the former triggers bugs in the latter.  I have made the porters aware of this issue several times, yet OpenLDAP 2.3 continues to list BDB 4.3 as a requirement, thus doing a dis-service to users not familiar with this fact.  Please change this dependancy to BDB 4.2.

Relevant URL (one of many):

http://www.openldap.org/lists/openldap-software/200506/msg00370.html

(Howard Chu is a leading developer of OpenLDAP)

Feel free to browse the OpenLDAP archives, or to ask on the various lists

Fix: 

Use BDB 4.2.
How-To-Repeat: N/A
